gt_sql: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.link_to_major = 'rec1N0upiVLy5esTO' AND T1.first_name = 'Katy'
pred_sql:
SELECT m.college
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Katy' 
AND mem.link_to_major = 'rec1N0upiVLy5esTO';
question: Please indicate the college of the person whose first name is Katy with the link to the major "rec1N0upiVLy5esTO".
